headline: Why Is Medtronic (MDT) Up 1.5% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Medtronic (MDT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Medtronic (MDT) Alerts Cyberattack Victims While Expanding Retia Cardiac Monitoring Partnership
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) has notified individuals affected by a cyberattack, outlining data security steps and offering identity protection support. The company reports no impact on patient safety or core operations related to this incident. Separately, Medtronic has expanded its partnership with Retia Medical to distribute advanced cardiac output monitoring technology more widely. The extended collaboration targets use in high risk surgeries and critical care settings to support clinicians...
